hero.name: Dr. Mario Ruvalcaba
hero.bio1: With over 5 years of practice as a surgeon, Dr. Mario Ruvalcaba has developed expertise in multiple procedures, not only in general surgery but also in bariatric surgery, maintaining a comprehensive and personalized approach for each patient.
hero.bio2: His training includes work with leading surgeons and ongoing education in minimally invasive and bariatric surgery, enabling him to offer a comprehensive approach to various procedures with high standards of quality and safety.
hero.certificacionConsejoLabel: Mexican Board of General Surgery Certification No.
hero.imageAlt: Dr. Mario Ruvalcaba — Board-Certified General and Bariatric Surgeon in Mérida, Yucatán
